Text:
New gold mining policy: Foreigners now barred from small-scale operations. via The Assay

https://mutapatimes.com/news/2026-06-25-zimbabwe-restricts-foreign-participation-in-small-scale-gold-mining-99efd8
#Zimbabwe #GoldMining #MiningPolicy
Alt text picture 1: Zimbabwe Restricts Foreign Participation in Small‑Scale Gold Mining

Text:
A new gold mining policy is set to reshape Zimbabwe's small-scale sector.

The government has announced restrictions on foreign participation in small-scale gold mining, a move that could significantly impact local miners and international investors alike. This decision aims to empower Zimbabwean citizens and ensure more direct benefits from the nation's rich gold reserves stay within the country.

For many small-scale miners, this could mean greater opportunities, but it also raises questions about investment, technology transfer, and the future landscape of the industry. The ripple effects will be felt across communities dependent on gold mining.
